creator: Alexander Terp
description: With a variadic positional (*tokens str), a lone - among the args fails parsing and the error names a later token: rad t.rad 5s TEST dialog - click Snooze 10m gives "Too many positional arguments. Unused: [click]". Reproduced 2026-06-10. Conventionally a lone - is a plain positional (or stdin). Two parts: treat bare - as a positional, and make the error point at the actual offender. Likely lives in the ra arg-parsing library. Adjacent: RAD-71 (negative-number positionals). From #139.
title: Bare - positional derails variadic parsing, error blames wrong token
